manualBaselineComparison.addedByTool: hash-bound per-file schema/provenance card and explicit duplicate/missing gates
manualBaselineComparison.manualSchemaOnlyCheck: pandas shape, column list, null count, duplicate count, and class value counts

whatItMissed: It did not know the target column semantics without the Batch 9 wrapper adding UCI metadata.
It did not detect train/test leakage because UCI publishes one table without an official split.
It cannot decide whether duplicate feature vectors would be legitimate without row-level provenance.
